metadata.description: This file maps Enterprise ATT&CK techniques from their previous ATT&CK IDs and STIX IDs to the ATT&CK IDs and STIX IDs used after the Defense Evasion tactic split. The Defense Evasion (TA0005) tactic has been renamed to Stealth (TA0005), and a new tactic named Defense Impairment (TA0112) has been created.
